labelledSet.publishGateReason: Audio is synthesized from the same local bundle and labelled with the text that created it. This self-labelled TTS→ASR loopback WER measures text preservation through the local TTS and ASR stack, not ASR accuracy on real recorded speech.
labelledSet.caveat: Audio is synthesized from the same local bundle and labelled with the text that created it. This self-labelled TTS→ASR loopback WER measures text preservation through the local TTS and ASR stack, not ASR accuracy on real recorded speech.
